overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a sci-fi vehicle cockpit on a foggy alien planet surface. The vehicle's orange HUD display retracts and the canopy opens to reveal red-lit interior components and the barren rocky wasteland outside.

entered.detail: complex amber-colored heads-up display with radar, system readouts, and targeting reticle
barren grey rocky ground stretching to the foggy horizon
dark metal structural frame of the cockpit left side
dark metal structural frame of the cockpit right side

segments.scene_description: The view is from inside a sci-fi vehicle cockpit with an active orange HUD displaying system information. The foggy barren landscape is visible through the front viewport, enclosed by the vehicle's canopy frame.

segments.scene_description: The complex orange HUD retracts, leaving a minimal blue display. The vehicle remains stationary observing the same foggy rocky terrain through the enclosed cockpit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open vehicle cockpit with canopy retracted

events.description: vehicle canopy begins to open, splitting and raising the front viewport panels
interior red lighting becomes visible as canopy fully opens exposing the cockpit interior

agents.ego_description: vehicle canopy opens exposing the interior to the foggy external environment

grey overcast sky now fully visible above the horizon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle canopy splits and opens upward, transitioning from an enclosed cockpit to an open platform. Red interior lighting illuminates the cockpit structure while the foggy sky and rocky terrain become fully visible and appear closer as the protective frame retracts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective from within a sci-fi cockpit that transforms from a digitally enclosed environment into an open-air view of an alien wasteland. It begins behind an active orange HUD displaying system information, framing a foggy, barren landscape through the vehicle's viewport. As the complex orange interface retracts into a minimal blue display, the camera remains stationary, observing the desolate rocky terrain through the glass. The scene then shifts as the canopy splits and opens upward, transitioning the view from an enclosed cabin to an open platform. Red interior lighting illuminates the cockpit structure while the protective frame disappears, finally revealing the foggy sky and rocky terrain in full, unobstructed detail.
